creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
* Configuring for Apache, Version 1.3.4
 *  + using installation path layout: GNU (config.layout)
 *  + on-the-fly added and activated frontpage module (modules/extra/mod_frontpage.
 * o)
 * configure:Error: invalid option 'i386--freebsd3.1'

Seems like apache doesn't use GNU configure even though it seems so.
Does it work if you change the line "GNU_CONFIGURE=yes" to
"HAS_CONFIGURE=yes"?

Satoshi
